creator: joshruehlig@gmail.com
text:
Maxim, it looks like you briefly mention 'AR=llvm-ar RANLIB=llvm-ranlib' in the linked commit and it is related to LTO?
https://github.com/sippy/rtpproxy/commit/767e23535b86cb27121857489e4f3cc21530dc6c

In that case, I think we could change...

	CONFIGURE_ENV+=	AR=llvm-ar RANLIB=llvm-ranlib

to...

	LTO_CONFIGURE_ENV=	AR=llvm-ar RANLIB=llvm-ranlib
